summary.original: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.).
summary.zhCN: 一组帮助我按照公司偏好的格式撰写各类内部沟通材料的资源。只要用户要求撰写某种内部沟通材料（状态报告、管理层更新、3P 更新、公司通讯、FAQ、事件报告、项目更新等），Claude 都应使用此技能。

description.original: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.). Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 一组帮助我按照公司偏好的格式撰写各类内部沟通材料的资源。只要用户要求撰写某种内部沟通材料（状态报告、管理层更新、3P 更新、公司通讯、FAQ、事件报告、项目更新等），Claude 都应使用此技能。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，提供章节导航、全文搜索和沙箱化源文件渲染；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA 56ea935b74f371bfeb4c7d3c19d5139df866e73b.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier Apache-2.0 recorded from skills/internal-comms/LICENSE.txt. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备面向具体任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有边界的用户目标和上下文，对已固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的情况下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。

features: 内部沟通任务 with two skill-specific task examples
受众、语气与组织背景 and bounded private context input
内部沟通写作包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 受众、语气与组织背景 panel
内部沟通写作包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-internal-comms: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-internal-comms: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-internal-comms: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-internal-comms] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-internal-comms; result=passed
skill-internal-comms: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
